title: Europe Needs a Unified Brain Health Strategy:  A Call to Action for MEPs and the Commission [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Establish an EU Coordination Plan for the Brain to overcome fragmentation and ensure an integrated EU-wide approach across prevention, treatment, care and research. Recognise brain health as a health, economic and social emergency, given its major burden and an estimated €1.7 trillion annual cost to Europe. Align EU action with the WHO Intersectoral Global Action […]
